summary: Iteration 50: QR Code Upload Feature for ReceiptUploadInline. All backend tests PASSED (10/10). Frontend verified: PO creation shows 'Click to upload' and 'Use Phone' buttons with QR panel. Expense form (compact mode) shows 'Attach Receipt' and 'Use Phone' buttons with QR panel. Phone upload page (/upload/{token}) displays record summary, 'Take Photo' and 'Choose from Gallery' buttons correctly.

feature_verification.POST /api/uploads/generate-pending-link: PASS — Creates pending session with token, session_id, record_id, expires_at
PASS — Adds token to existing session, session_id unchanged
feature_verification.GET /api/uploads/session-status/{session: PASS — Returns file_count and files list with id, filename, content_type
feature_verification.GET /api/uploads/preview/{token}: PASS — Returns record_summary with custom title/description/amount for pending sessions
feature_verification.POST /api/uploads/upload/{token} (phone: PASS — Public endpoint accepts files without auth
feature_verification.Frontend PO creation - ReceiptUploadInli: PASS — data-testid='receipt-upload-inline' present with 'Click to upload' and 'Use Phone' buttons
feature_verification.Frontend PO creation - QR panel: PASS — data-testid='qr-upload-panel' displays with QR code SVG, copy link button, status text
feature_verification.Frontend Expense form - ReceiptUploadInl: PASS — Compact mode with 'Attach Receipt' and 'Use Phone' buttons
feature_verification.Frontend Expense form - QR panel: PASS — QR panel displays correctly in compact mode
feature_verification.Phone upload page /upload/{token}: PASS — Shows record summary (type_label, title, description, amount), 'Take Photo' and 'Choose from Gallery' buttons

critical_code_review_comments: ReceiptUploadInline.js: Well-implemented with both direct upload and QR-based phone upload. Polls for phone uploads every 3 seconds when QR panel is active.
uploads.py generate-pending-link endpoint (lines 462-521): Correctly creates pending sessions with token or adds token to existing session. Uses secure token_urlsafe(24).
uploads.py session-status endpoint (lines 524-534): Returns proper file metadata for polling.
uploads.py preview endpoint (lines 144-165): Public endpoint correctly returns record_summary for phone upload page.
UploadPage.js: Clean mobile-friendly design with camera/gallery buttons, record summary display, and proper file handling.

test_credentials.note: Company admin credentials (jovelyneahig@gmail.com) returned 'Invalid credentials' - may need to be updated

context_for_next_testing_agent: QR code upload feature fully tested and working. POST /api/uploads/generate-pending-link creates pending sessions with QR tokens. GET /api/uploads/session-status/{session_id} enables polling for phone uploads. GET /api/uploads/preview/{token} is a public endpoint for phone upload page. Frontend ReceiptUploadInline component has both 'Click to upload' (direct) and 'Use Phone' (QR) options with proper data-testid attributes. Phone upload page at /upload/{token} displays record details and camera/gallery buttons. Branch Transfer receive was not tested due to no pending transfers in test data.
